evidence.summary: Read all 5 reference groups: converged design, meihua vertical slice, base implementation (RecordRepository/DriftRecordDataSource/LocalRecordRepository/RecordAdapterRegistry), meihua adapter/repository/migration, liuyao port/contract, and surveyed 5 other module ports

Created and enhanced design document at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-25-record-storage-base-class-design.md with all 9 sections + Quick Start README + Code Review guide + DemoDivination end-to-end example

completion_summary: Design document complete (1198 lines). Contains: §0.5 Quick Start/README (3-step access, architecture diagram, checklist, FAQ), §1 duplication analysis, §2 Base design with Dart signatures + inheritance vs composition, §3 search_index generalization, §4 reusable migration, §5 new module onboarding with MeiHua/Liuyao/DemoDivination code examples, §6 risks/trade-offs including §6.8 Code Review perspective (blocker/suggestion checklists, test suggestions), §7 file organization, §8 NEEDS_CONTEXT (4 items), §9 appendix.
